name: mcpqa
description: MCP QA Framework — validate MCP servers, Claude Code skills, and extensions with a 5-gated pipeline (schema, security, functional, skills, extensions)

tools.name: validate_mcp_server
tools.description: Run schema, security, and functional validation against an MCP server

tools.name: validate_skill
tools.description: Validate a Claude Code skill directory (SKILL.md, frontmatter, structure)

tools.name: validate_extension
tools.description: Validate a Claude Desktop extension (manifest, permissions, security)
